message:
🐛 Add JWT Authorization header to MCP API fetch calls in status card hooks (#2729)

Fixes #2643. Status card hooks (Contour, Strimzi, KubeVela, KEDA,
OpenFeature, CloudEvents, Fluentd, Flatcar, Lima, CRI-O) and
useCachedData used raw fetch() without the Authorization header when
calling /api/mcp/* endpoints. These endpoints require JWT auth
(middleware.JWTAuth on the /api group), so the calls returned 401 in
production.

Added an authFetch() helper in lib/api.ts that wraps fetch() and
auto-injects the Bearer token from localStorage. All 18 raw fetch()
calls to MCP endpoints now use authFetch instead.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
